issues.description: Card has significant effect text but effects array is empty. Missing effect: Blocker keyword, opponent's turn conditional power boost based on hand size.
effectText field should be populated with the card's ability text for reference.

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[Blocker]
[Opponent's Turn] If you have 7 or less cards in your hand, this Character's base power becomes the same as your Leader's base power.
